constraints: Choose versions by highest contract impact

steps: Compare the proposed v0.4.1, v0.4.2, and v0.5.0 scopes with version policy
Inspect assessment locator and report-template ownership across producing skills
validation: Auditor and code-reviewer template reference inspection
execution.last_completed_step: Recorded v0.4.2 as conditional and retained the shared locator under repository ownership.
execution.next_action: Use the fresh baseline to create a bounded v0.4.1 remediation workflow.

results.summary: The mandatory release train is v0.4.1 then v0.5.0. v0.4.2 is contingency-only. The audit report template is already skill-owned; the shared assessment locator remains repository-owned.
tests_run: Policy and template ownership cross-review completed
results.residual_risk: A future owner/path change would require a minor-release migration and frozen legacy compatibility.
